title: PersonWorkItemRole
description: Association table linking persons to work items with specific roles and time periods

work_item_id.description: Foreign key reference to the work item

person_id.description: Foreign key reference to the person

role_id.description: Foreign key reference to the role

organization_id.description: Foreign key reference to the organization in context of this assignment

end_date.description: End date of the assignment (null if ongoing)

is_active.description: Whether the assignment is currently active
